raw_text: worst app no refund and not at all helpful... very very disappointed please don't order from this app if you want to return there's no option the team is not at all supportive and they keep us waiting when we chat... they don't reply they don't refund ..I had the worst experience.. the products are low quality I ordered a cervical pillow but the quality of the product was too low as compared to the price... when I complained they didn't help instead just kept on ignoring.

Absolutely love using Blinkit! The delivery is super fast, products are always fresh, and the app is very easy to use. It has made grocery shopping so convenient, especially during busy days. The delivery partners are polite and orders usually arrive exactly as expected. Great discounts, good packaging, and excellent customer experience overall. Highly recommended!

The app is really good — almost all items are available and delivery is fast and on time. However, even though Blinkit is available in Kurnool, it is still not delivering to my area. It shows “Sorry! We are not delivering here yet.” Other delivery apps are able to serve this area. It has been quite a long time, and I hope the service expands to more areas in Kurnool soon. This would make the app much more useful for people like us.

it's a fabulous last minute app. it arrives in short time,and it's quality is amazing and fresh most of the time. perhaps— sometimes the price rate is high, compared to the local prices but its not that high because the delivery person also suffers and by including delivery payment, i think it's ok for the high prices sometimes. Sometimes the delivery is free by the way and its amazing.

Absolutely horrible app I would reccomend using swiggy or zepto. These guys don't care about thier customers at all. I ordered food for my pet thinking it would be delivered in 10 mins since that is what the app showed. Food didn't come for an hour and there were absolutely no updates what so ever. When I was finally allowed to called the delivery partner, he told me his vehicle was broken down and they aren't allowed to call us until they reach the location. No updates, no help. Worst app ever!

It was working well till a few months back. Over the past few months the service has become poorer. The ice cream was melted & solidified in a weird shape with remains of ice cream from another one. I tried raising a complaint. However the app showed that its server is jammed and so no request can be accepted. It kept on rejecting my request. No solution till date. Very poor services.

Very useful for ordering vegetables and groceries. Every item comes fresh and well packed. Drinks come in chilled condition. Their maximum average delivery time is hardly 10-15 mins. That's very impressive. Electronics and some other useful products are also available here at their best prices. Fruits are also available but their prices are 3-times than the offline market price that's make no sense to me. So, I avoid ordering vegetables.

I had a very disappointing experience with Blinkit. My order was cancelled without any valid reason, and I have still not received a refund for it. What's worse is that there is absolutely no proper customer support to resolve the issue-no response, no accountability. This kind of service is unacceptable, especially when customers trust the app for quick and reliable delivery. If orders can be cancelled arbitrarily and refunds are not processed on time, it raises serious concerns.

Worst customer service. First my items got delivered at the wrong address. Then after calling the delivery partner, who was rude and not agreeing that he delivered it at the wrong location, and did not even recheck the address in his app, finally agreed after I sent him a screenshot. Then the awesome customer service, who charged me for a surcharge ( timely delivery), but didn't want to refund this money even after they did provide the timely service.

It was a very disappointing experience ordering through Blinkit. The item delivered was not in the size I had selected, and unfortunately, I’m unable to return it since it is marked as non-refundable. It would have been better if there had been a proper confirmation or warning before placing the order. Very disappointed 😔

I am extremely disappointed with my experience. On 5 June 2026, I placed an order worth ₹250, and the payment was successfully deducted from my account. However, the order was never placed. When I contacted support through the chat box, I was informed that the amount would be refunded by 10 June 2026. Today, the refund has still not been credited to my account. Additionally, there appears to be no proper customer care support available to resolve this issue i request not to the blink it app

You should deliver the order to the specified delivery address rather than the current location, as the location shown can sometimes be incorrect. I have faced significant issues because of this; the delivery personal often speak rudely because they are unable to find the location due to the inaccurate data being displayed.

There is no way to contact anyone for issues related to order delivery. Only one of 3 orders placed on a day was delivered. For the rest their warehouse called after a few hour and asked us to pick up the order ourselves. We have been trying to resolve this within the app but the "Assistant" refuses to help and there is no other way to get a resolution or refund for the orders that were not delivered. We have been using this app for a few years but now the quality of service has gone down.

The delivery speed is good, but the customer service is terrible if something goes wrong. I have had three instances where my order was never delivered, but my money was deducted. Blinkit claims the refund is processed and blames the bank, but the money never arrives. Your customer support is just a wall of unhelpful automated replies and offers no real human assistance. I have lost money three times now and will not be using this app again. BEWARE OF BLINKIT

I had uninstalled this for long because of delivery issue,now app doesn't have any resolution if the items are missing or broken or spoiled items are delivered,I recently ordered eggs and many eggs were broken i tried customer support , damaged product query only not listed ,no refund or replacement ,waste of money ,i deleted and will never install your app

1. When I send audio recording delivery instructions, I tried to play it back, it just turns off after few seconds, so I can't hear back what I recorded. 2. There must be a save for later option like amazon. It helps to add product which I have seen but don't want to buy now. 3. Also if price has been increased or decreased, I must know. It becomes difficult to order when I have large list of items.

Why do you need to collect all our data... Permission for our records, analytics, financial transactions, contacts, location, etc etc...I feel unsafe to allow access to all that, specially just for grocery items. Second point being when order without notice they don't bring an ordered item & change the bill & none of the delivery guys carry any cash changes & threaten to not give COD if we don't receive an incomplete order,clearly mentioned not to call.. still they call..Terrible & Pathetic..

Very disappointing experience. I added extra items only to qualify for free delivery, but Blinkit silently removed one item during payment and also removed it from the order details. After delivery, I realized I received only 3 items instead of 4. Now I have to place another order and again add unnecessary items to get free delivery. This feels misleading and unfair.

Worst experience with Blinkit. They instantly accepted my order and charged my credit card, but later cancelled it saying the item was out of stock. If the product wasn't available, why was the order accepted in the first place? Payment gets deducted immediately, but refund takes 4-7 days for a mistake from Blinkit's side. Customers should not have to wait for their own money because of poor inventory management. Very disappointing service

Very convenient app for ordering daily essentials. I’ve been using regularly, and it’s been really helpful. You can order anything from groceries, snacks, and laundry items to even pharmacy essentials. The best part is the speed—most of my orders were delivered within 8–12 minutes, consistently! Whether it was early morning or late at night, the service was reliable and efficient every single time. The app is easy to use, and the quick delivery makes a huge difference in daily life.
